title: EU air passenger rights reform is flying off course [Promoted Content]
summary_full: EU lawmakers are in the final stretch of negotiating reforms to EU passenger rights rules. Rushing through a flawed revision only drives up costs without addressing the real cause of most delays.
summary_public: EU lawmakers are in the final stretch of negotiating reforms to EU passenger rights rules. Rushing through a flawed revision only drives up costs without addressing the real cause of most delays.
